title: Humming Strongbox
description: A dented strongbox hums on a cracked altar, leaking sickly green light through its seams. Coins glint inside — but the air tastes of rot and bad luck.

options.text: Crack it open and pocket the coins
options.result: Coins spill into your hands — and a film of orange rust creeps up your arm. A curse settles into your pack.

options.text: Leave it. Nothing glows green for free.
options.result: You back away. The box hums on, waiting for someone greedier.
